title: eupatorium benjamin-lincolnii var. itacolumiense
intro: Eupatorium benjamin-lincolnii var. itacolumiense, also known as Western Joe Pye Weed or Itacolumi Western Joe Pye Weed, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Pacific coast of North America, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant contains compounds like sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which may contribute to its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. Western Joe Pye Weed can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which may be beneficial for treating conditions like fever, colds, and respiratory issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
